name: UltraLight Trail Running Shoe
description: Breathable mesh upper with a cushioned midsole designed for long-distance trail running. Features a lugged rubber outsole for grip on loose terrain and a rock plate to protect against sharp debris.

name: Stainless Steel French Press (1 L)
description: Double-walled stainless steel French press with a fine-mesh plunger filter. Keeps coffee hot for up to two hours and eliminates sediment for a clean, full-flavoured brew.

name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Over-ear Bluetooth headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and foldable design. Soft memory-foam ear cushions provide all-day comfort.

name: Bamboo Cutting Board with Juice Groove
description: Extra-large bamboo cutting board with a deep juice groove to catch drips. Naturally antimicrobial surface. Includes rubber feet to prevent slipping.

name: Adjustable Dumbbell Set (5–52.5 kg)
description: Quick-adjust dial mechanism replaces 15 pairs of dumbbells. Sold as a pair with a compact storage tray. Weight increments of 2.5 kg up to 52.5 kg.

name: Merino Wool Base Layer (Long Sleeve)
description: 100% merino wool thermal top that regulates body temperature in cold and warm conditions. Odour-resistant and machine washable. Available in XS to XXL.

name: Standing Desk Converter (76 cm)
description: Sit-stand desk riser with a pneumatic lift arm. Raises and lowers with one hand in under three seconds. Holds up to 18 kg and fits monitors up to 76 cm.

name: Cast Iron Skillet (26 cm)
description: Pre-seasoned cast iron frying pan suitable for use on all hob types including induction. Oven-safe up to 260 °C. Builds a natural non-stick coating with use.

name: Portable Solar Charger (20 W)
description: Foldable 20 W solar panel with dual USB-A and USB-C outputs. Charges a phone in under two hours in direct sunlight. Weather-resistant nylon canvas.

name: Ceramic Pour-Over Coffee Dripper
description: Single-cup ceramic dripper with a wide opening and spiral ridges to promote even extraction. Compatible with standard size 2 paper or reusable filters.

name: Foam Yoga Mat (6 mm)
description: Non-slip TPE foam yoga mat, 183 × 61 cm, 6 mm thick. Closed-cell surface repels moisture and bacteria. Includes a carrying strap.

name: Waterproof Hiking Backpack (30 L)
description: 30-litre daypack with a rain cover, padded hip belt, and hydration bladder sleeve. Multiple external attachment points for trekking poles.

name: Mechanical Keyboard (Tenkeyless, Red Switches)
description: Compact TKL mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX Red linear switches. White RGB backlighting, aluminium top plate, and braided USB-C cable.

name: Insulated Water Bottle (1 L)
description: Double-walled vacuum-insulated stainless steel bottle. Keeps liquids cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 hours. Leak-proof lid. BPA-free.

name: Resistance Band Set (5 Levels)
description: Set of five latex resistance bands ranging from 5 to 45 kg equivalent resistance. Includes a carry bag and door anchor. Suitable for strength training and physiotherapy.

name: LED Desk Lamp with USB Charging Port
description: Dimmable LED desk lamp with five brightness levels and three colour temperatures. Built-in USB-A port for device charging. Flexible gooseneck arm.

name: Camping Hammock (2-Person)
description: Lightweight parachute nylon hammock rated for 200 kg. Includes two carabiner clips and 3-metre tree straps. Packs into an integrated stuff sack.

name: Stainless Steel Meal Prep Containers (Set of 5)
description: Leak-proof stainless steel containers with airtight locking lids. Dishwasher, freezer, and oven safe. 600 ml, 900 ml, and 1200 ml sizes included.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Fully adjustable office chair with lumbar support, 3D armrests, breathable mesh back, and seat-depth adjustment. Certified for 8-hour office use.

name: Smart Wi-Fi Plug (4-Pack)
description: Compact Wi-Fi smart plugs compatible with Alexa and Google Home. Schedule, monitor energy usage, and control remotely via mobile app.

name: Leather Wallet (Slim Bifold)
description: Full-grain leather bifold wallet with RFID-blocking inner lining. Holds up to 8 cards plus cash. Slim 6 mm profile when empty.

name: Stainless Steel Cocktail Shaker (500 ml)
description: Three-piece cocktail shaker with built-in strainer and measuring cap. Mirror-polished 18/8 stainless steel. Leak-proof seal.

name: Polarised Sunglasses (UV400)
description: Lightweight TR90 frame with polarised polycarbonate lenses. UV400 protection filters 100% of UVA and UVB rays. Includes hard case and microfibre cloth.

name: Cordless Handheld Vacuum Cleaner
description: 20 V lithium-ion handheld vacuum with a washable HEPA filter and 30-minute runtime. Includes crevice tool, brush attachment, and charging dock.

name: Wooden Chess Set (40 cm Board)
description: Hand-carved weighted wooden chess pieces with a felted base. Folding walnut-and-maple board doubles as a storage box. King height 9 cm.

name: Cold Brew Coffee Maker (1 L)
description: Mason jar-style cold brew maker with a fine-mesh stainless steel filter. Brew 1 litre of concentrate in 12–24 hours in the fridge. Dishwasher safe.

name: Running Armband Phone Holder
description: Adjustable neoprene armband fits phones up to 6.8 inches. Touch-screen compatible window. Reflective strip for low-light visibility.

name: Electric Kettle (1.7 L, Temperature Control)
description: Variable temperature electric kettle with five presets (60–100 °C). Keeps water warm for 30 minutes. 360° cordless base. Boils 1.7 L in under 3 minutes.

name: Laptop Stand (Adjustable, Aluminium)
description: Foldable aluminium laptop stand with six height settings. Fits laptops from 10 to 17 inches. Non-slip silicone pads protect the laptop and desk.

name: Garden Kneeler and Seat
description: Dual-use garden kneeler that converts into a bench seat. Steel frame with thick foam pad. Folds flat for storage. Includes two side tool pouches.

name: Compact Air Purifier (HEPA H13)
description: Three-stage air purifier with a True HEPA H13 filter covering rooms up to 20 m². Auto mode adjusts fan speed based on air quality sensor. Ultra-quiet (22 dB).

name: Reusable Silicone Food Storage Bags (Set of 6)
description: Leakproof silicone zip bags in three sizes: 500 ml, 1 L, and 2 L. Freezer, microwave, and dishwasher safe. Replaces single-use plastic bags.

name: Trekking Poles (Collapsible, Carbon Fibre)
description: Pair of lightweight carbon fibre trekking poles. Collapsible to 36 cm for packing. Anti-shock system with tungsten carbide tips and interchangeable baskets.

name: Stainless Steel Spice Rack (12 Jars)
description: Wall-mounted magnetic spice rack with 12 labelled stainless steel jars. Includes a sample label sheet and wall-mounting hardware.

name: Under-Desk Cable Management Tray
description: Clamp-on cable management tray that holds power strips and cables under your desk. No drilling required. Holds up to 5 kg.

name: Silicone Baking Mat (Set of 2)
description: Non-stick silicone baking sheets, 40 × 30 cm. Replace parchment paper. Oven-safe to 260 °C. Measurements printed for accurate pastry work.

name: Posture Corrector Brace
description: Adjustable upper-back brace that gently pulls shoulders into alignment. Breathable mesh fabric. Fits chest circumference 70–130 cm. Wear under clothing.

name: Mini Projector (1080p, Portable)
description: Pocket-size 1080p projector with built-in speaker, HDMI and USB-C inputs, and 120-inch projection capability. 90-minute battery life on built-in power.

name: Plant-Based Protein Powder (Chocolate, 1 kg)
description: Pea and brown rice protein blend with 25 g protein per serving. Chocolate flavour with no artificial sweeteners. Gluten-free and soy-free.

name: Foldable Camping Chair
description: Lightweight aluminium camping chair with 150 kg capacity. Folds to 45 × 15 cm and includes a carry bag. Breathable mesh seating with cup holder.

name: Digital Bathroom Scale (Smart, 180 kg)
description: Smart scale measuring weight, body fat, BMI, muscle mass, and bone density. Syncs to a smartphone app via Bluetooth. Tempered glass platform.

name: Stainless Steel Lunch Box (2-Tier)
description: Two-compartment stainless steel bento box with a leak-proof silicone seal. Total capacity 1200 ml. Dishwasher safe. Includes a fork and spoon.

name: Rechargeable Headlamp (350 lm)
description: USB-C rechargeable headlamp with three brightness modes and a red night-vision light. IPX4 water resistance. Single charge lasts up to 120 hours on low mode.

name: Ergonomic Mouse Pad with Wrist Rest
description: Memory foam wrist-support mouse pad with a non-slip rubber base. Smooth fabric top for precise tracking. 36 × 18 cm.

name: Electric Salt and Pepper Grinder Set
description: Battery-operated ceramic grinder mechanism with adjustable coarseness. LED light illuminates the grind. Set of two matching mills.

name: Foam Roller (Deep Tissue, 45 cm)
description: High-density EVA foam roller with multi-dimensional surface for trigger-point release and myofascial massage. 45 × 14 cm.

name: Cable Knit Throw Blanket (130 × 150 cm)
description: Chunky hand-knit cotton throw. Machine washable. 130 × 150 cm. Suitable for sofas, beds, or outdoor seating. Available in six neutral tones.

name: Plant Watering Globe (Set of 4)
description: Blown-glass self-watering globes that slowly release water to plant roots over 7–14 days. Ideal for holidays. Set of four in assorted colours.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker (IPX7 Waterproof)
description: 360° waterproof Bluetooth 5.3 speaker with 20-hour playtime and a built-in carabiner clip. Floats on water. Pairs with a second unit for stereo sound.

name: Zero-Gravity Recliner Chair
description: Outdoor zero-gravity reclining chair with a padded headrest and cup holder. Steel frame, breathable textilene fabric. Rated for 150 kg.
